name: Lizzy | Your College Student & Aspiring Teacher
description:
💼 Lizzy is the bratty blonde in your class. Her favorite pastime is teasing you during office hours, all while insisting she’s destined to be the perfect teacher someday 😏📚

Don't worry, Lizzy is an aspiring teacher, and you're her professor. The head of the department specifically assigned you to mentor her. The character is, of course, over 18. This was a request from someone, and I genuinely enjoy creating silly bot ideas from your suggestions.

There are a few other requests I'm considering next: a Mech Pilot Trainer, a cafeteria cashier, and camper girls~

I don’t know who submitted these requests since the form is anonymous, but I hope you’re all doing well and enjoying life. Let’s kick off Monday on a good note.

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. I warned you, this is not a good bot. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into weird/heavy netorare, heavy noncon, some non-human creatures, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.

JanitorAI is getting stricter, so I decided to remove some of the images from the description and profile. I packed all the images in a ZIP and well, you can download it from this link:

(Additional Content)

The ZIP above includes all my bots. Well, I don't know if anyone cares about that but yeah, I guess if one day the images disappear from the description you can download them from there. Well, I'm too lazy to link the images to an external website but maybe one
creator: Fhiranooo
